where.if: AND (c.order_id::TEXT ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR c.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR c.prod_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR m.member_email ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT c.*, o.order_date, o.order_status_cd, o.pay_method_cd, o.recv_nm, o.recv_phone, o.recv_addr, m.member_email, m.member_phone AS member_phone_origin, cd_ct.code_label AS claim_type_cd_nm, cd_cs.code_label AS claim_status_cd_nm, cd_rm.code_label AS refund_method_cd_nm, cd_rb.code_label AS refund_bank_cd_nm, cd_rc.code_label AS return_courier_cd_nm, cd_rs.code_label AS return_status_cd_nm, cd_ic.code_label AS inbound_courier_cd_nm, cd_ec.code_label AS exchange_courier_cd_nm, cd_ap.code_label AS appr_status_cd_nm, cd_at.code_label AS appr_target_cd_nm FROM od_claim c LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = c.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = c.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'CLAIM_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.claim_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CLAIM_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.claim_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rm ON cd_rm.code_grp = 'REFUND_METHOD' AND cd_rm.code_value = c.refund_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rb ON cd_rb.code_grp = 'BANK_CODE' AND cd_rb.code_value = c.refund_bank_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rc ON cd_rc.code_grp = 'COURIER' AND cd_rc.code_value = c.return_courier_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'DLIV_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = c.return_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ic ON cd_ic.code_grp = 'COURIER' AND cd_ic.code_value = c.inbound_courier_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ec ON cd_ec.code_grp = 'COURIER' AND cd_ec.code_value = c.exchange_courier_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ap ON cd_ap.code_grp = 'APPROVAL_STATUS' AND cd_ap.code_value = c.appr_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_at ON cd_at.code_grp = 'APPROVAL_TARGET' AND cd_at.code_value = c.appr_target_cd WHERE c.claim_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM od_claim c LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = c.member_id

SELECT c.*, cd_ct.code_label AS claim_type_cd_nm, cd_cs.code_label AS claim_status_cd_nm, cd_rm.code_label AS refund_method_cd_nm FROM od_claim c LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'CLAIM_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.claim_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CLAIM_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.claim_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rm ON cd_rm.code_grp = 'REFUND_METHOD' AND cd_rm.code_value = c.refund_method_cd WHERE c.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY c.request_date ASC
